12: module soc_interconnect #(
13:     parameter USE_AXI           = 1,
14:     parameter ADDR_WIDTH        = 32,
15:     parameter N_HWPE_PORTS      = 4,
16:     parameter N_MASTER_32       = 5+N_HWPE_PORTS,
17:     parameter N_MASTER_AXI_64   = 1,
18:     parameter DATA_WIDTH        = 32,
19:     parameter BE_WIDTH          = DATA_WIDTH/8,
20:     parameter ID_WIDTH          = N_MASTER_32+N_MASTER_AXI_64*4,
21:     parameter AUX_WIDTH         = 8,
22:     parameter N_L2_BANKS        = 4,
23:     parameter N_L2_BANKS_PRI    = 2,
24:     parameter ADDR_L2_WIDTH     = 12,
25:     parameter ADDR_L2_PRI_WIDTH = 12,
26:     parameter ROM_ADDR_WIDTH    = 10,
27:     // AXI PARAMS
28:     // 32 bit axi Interface
29:     parameter AXI_32_ID_WIDTH   = 12,
30:     parameter AXI_32_USER_WIDTH = 6,
31:     // 64 bit axi Interface
32:     parameter AXI_ADDR_WIDTH    = 32,
33:     parameter AXI_DATA_WIDTH    = 64,
34:     parameter AXI_STRB_WIDTH    = 8,
35:     parameter AXI_USER_WIDTH    = 6,
36:     parameter AXI_ID_WIDTH      = 7
37: ) (
38:     input  logic                                                clk,
39:     input  logic                                                rst_n,
40:     input  logic                                                test_en_i,
41:     output logic [N_L2_BANKS-1:0]     [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]          L2_D_o,
42:     output logic [N_L2_BANKS-1:0]     [ADDR_L2_WIDTH-1:0]       L2_A_o,
43:     output logic [N_L2_BANKS-1:0]                               L2_CEN_o,
44:     output logic [N_L2_BANKS-1:0]                               L2_WEN_o,
45:     output logic [N_L2_BANKS-1:0]     [BE_WIDTH-1:0]            L2_BE_o,
46:     output logic [N_L2_BANKS-1:0]     [31:0]                    L2_ID_o,
47:     input  logic [N_L2_BANKS-1:0]     [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]          L2_Q_i,
48:     //RISC DATA PORT
49:     input  logic                                                FC_DATA_req_i,
50:     input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]                               FC_DATA_add_i,
51:     input  logic                                                FC_DATA_wen_i,
52:     input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]                               FC_DATA_wdata_i,
53:     input  logic [BE_WIDTH-1:0]                                 FC_DATA_be_i,
54:     input  logic [AUX_WIDTH-1:0]                                FC_DATA_aux_i,
55:     output logic                                                FC_DATA_gnt_o,
56:     output logic [AUX_WIDTH-1:0]                                FC_DATA_r_aux_o,
57:     output logic                                                FC_DATA_r_valid_o,
58:     output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]                               FC_DATA_r_rdata_o,
59:     output logic                                                FC_DATA_r_opc_o,
60:     // RISC INSTR PORT
61:     input  logic                                                FC_INSTR_req_i,
62:     input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]                               FC_INSTR_add_i,
63:     input  logic                                                FC_INSTR_wen_i,
64:     input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]                               FC_INSTR_wdata_i,
65:     input  logic [BE_WIDTH-1:0]                 
[TRUNCATED]

12: `include "pulp_soc_defines.sv"
13: `include "soc_bus_defines.sv"
14: 
15: module pulp_soc #(
16:     parameter CORE_TYPE          = 0,
17:     parameter USE_FPU            = 1,
18:     parameter USE_CLUSTER_EVENT  = 1,
19:     parameter AXI_ADDR_WIDTH     = 32,
20:     parameter AXI_DATA_IN_WIDTH  = 64,
21:     parameter AXI_DATA_OUT_WIDTH = 32,
22:     parameter AXI_ID_IN_WIDTH    = 6,
23:     parameter AXI_ID_OUT_WIDTH   = 6,
24:     parameter AXI_USER_WIDTH     = 6,
25:     parameter AXI_STRB_WIDTH_IN  = AXI_DATA_IN_WIDTH/8,
26:     parameter AXI_STRB_WIDTH_OUT = AXI_DATA_OUT_WIDTH/8,
27:     parameter BUFFER_WIDTH       = 8,
28:     parameter EVNT_WIDTH         = 8,
29:     parameter NB_HWPE_PORTS      = 4
30: ) (
31:     input  logic                          ref_clk_i,
32:     input  logic                          slow_clk_i,
33:     input  logic                          test_clk_i,
34:     input  logic                          rstn_glob_i,
35: 
36:     input  logic                          sel_fll_clk_i,
37: 
38:     input  logic                          dft_test_mode_i,
39:     input  logic                          dft_cg_enable_i,
40:     input  logic                          mode_select_i,
41:     input  logic [7:0]                    soc_jtag_reg_i,
42:     output logic [7:0]                    soc_jtag_reg_o,
43:     input  logic                          boot_l2_i,
44: 
45:     output logic                          cluster_rtc_o,
46:     output logic                          cluster_fetch_enable_o,
47:     output logic [63:0]                   cluster_boot_addr_o,
48:     output logic                          cluster_test_en_o,
49:     output logic                          cluster_pow_o,
50:     output logic                          cluster_byp_o,
51:     output logic                          cluster_rstn_o,
52:     output logic                          cluster_irq_o,
53:     // AXI4 SLAVE
54:     input  logic [7:0]                    data_slave_aw_writetoken_i,
55:     input  logic [AXI_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]     data_slave_aw_addr_i,
56:     input  logic [2:0]                    data_slave_aw_prot_i,
57:     input  logic [3:0]                    data_slave_aw_region_i,
58:     input  logic [7:0]                    data_slave_aw_len_i,
59:     input  logic [2:0]                    data_slave_aw_size_i,
60:     input  logic [1:0]                    data_slave_aw_burst_i,
61:     input  logic                          data_slave_aw_lock_i,
62:     input  logic [3:0]                    data_slave_aw_cache_i,
63:     input  logic [3:0]                    data_slave_aw_qos_i,
64:     input  logic [AXI_ID_IN_WIDTH-1:0]    data_slave_aw_id_i,
65:     input  logic [AXI_USER_WIDTH-1:0]     data_slave_aw_user_i,
66:     output logic [7:0]                    data_slave_aw_readpointer_o,
67:     input  logic [7:0]                    data_slave_ar_writetoken_i,
68:     input  logic [AXI_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]     data_slave_ar_addr_i,
69:     input  logic [2:0]                    data_slave_ar_prot_i,
70:     input  logic [3:0]                    data_slave_ar_region_i,
71:     input  logic [7:0]                    data_slave_ar_len_i,
72:     input  logic [2:0]                    data_slave_ar_size_i,
73:     input  logic [1:0]                    
[TRUNCATED]

{"tool": "read_file", "status": "ok", "content": "150:     input  logic [AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0]                           AXI_Slave_w_data_i,
151:     input  logic [AXI_STRB_WIDTH-1:0]                           AXI_Slave_w_strb_i,
152:     input  logic                                                AXI_Slave_w_last_i,
153:     input  logic                                                AXI_Slave_w_valid_i,
154:     output logic                                                AXI_Slave_w_ready_o,
155:     // WRITE RESPONSE CHANNEL
156:     output logic [AXI_ID_WIDTH-1:0]                             AXI_Slave_b_id_o,
157:     output logic [1:0]                                          AXI_Slave_b_resp_o,
158:     output logic [AXI_USER_WIDTH-1:0]                           AXI_Slave_b_user_o,
159:     output logic                                                AXI_Slave_b_valid_o,
160:     input  logic                                                AXI_Slave_b_ready_i,
161:     // READ CHANNEL
162:     output logic [AXI_ID_WIDTH-1:0]                             AXI_Slave_r_id_o,
163:     output logic [AXI_USER_WIDTH-1:0]                           AXI_Slave_r_user_o,
164:     output logic [AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0]                           AXI_Slave_r_data_o,
165:     output logic [1:0]                                          AXI_Slave_r_resp_o,
166:     output logic                                                AXI_Slave_r_last_o,
167:     output logic                                                AXI_Slave_r_valid_o,
168:     input  logic                                                AXI_Slave_r_ready_i,
169:     // BRIDGES
170:     // CH_0 --> APB
171:     output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]                               APB_PADDR_o,
172:     output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]                               APB_PWDATA_o,
173:     output logic                                                APB_PWRITE_o,
174:     output logic                                                APB_PSEL_o,
175:     output logic                                                APB_PENABLE_o,
176:     input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]                               APB_PRDATA_i,
177:     input  logic                                                APB_PREADY_i,
178:     input  logic                                                APB_PSLVERR_i,
179:     // CH_1 --> AXI
180:     // ---------------------------------------------------------
181:     // AXI TARG Port Declarations ------------------------------
182:     // ---------------------------------------------------------
183:     //AXI write address bus -------------- // USED// -----------
184:     output logic [AXI_32_ID_WIDTH-1:0]                          AXI_Master_aw_id_o,
185:     output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]                               AXI_Master_aw_addr_o,
186:     output logic [7:0]                                          AXI_Master_aw_len_o,
187:     output logic [2:0]                                          AXI_Master_aw_size_o,
188:     output logic [1:0]                                          AXI_Master_aw_burst_o,
189:     output logic                                                AXI_Master_aw_lock_o,
190:     output logic [3:0]                                          AXI_Master_aw_cache_o,
191:     output logic [2:0]                                          AXI_Master_aw_prot_o,
192:     output logic [3:0]                                          AXI_Master_aw_region_o,
193:     output logic [AXI_32_USER_WIDTH-1:0]                        AXI_Master_aw_user_o,
194:     output logic [3:0]                                          AXI_Master_aw_qos_o,
195:     output logic                                                AXI_Master_aw_valid_o,
196:     input  logic                                                AXI_Master_aw_ready_i,
197:     // ---------------------------------------------------------
198:     //AXI write data bus -------------- // USED// ----
[TRUNCATED]

// SOC PERIPHERALS APB BUS PARAMETRES
`define NB_MASTER  11

// MASTER PORT TO FLL
`define FLL_START_ADDR           32'h1A10_0000
`define FLL_END_ADDR             32'h1A10_0FFF

// MASTER PORT TO GPIO
`define GPIO_START_ADDR          32'h1A10_1000
`define GPIO_END_ADDR            32'h1A10_AFFF

// MASTER PORT TO SPI MASTER
`define UDMA_START_ADDR          32'h1A10_2000
`define UDMA_END_ADDR            32'h1A10_4FFF

// MASTER PORT TO SOC CONTROL
`define SOC_CTRL_START_ADDR      32'h1A10_4000
`define SOC_CTRL_END_ADDR        32'h1A10_4FFF

// MASTER PORT TO ADV TIMER
`define ADV_TIMER_START_ADDR     32'h1A10_5000
`define ADV_TIMER_END_ADDR       32'h1A10_5FFF

// MASTER PORT TO SOC EVENT GEN
`define SOC_EVENT_GEN_START_ADDR 32'h1A10_6000
`define SOC_EVENT_GEN_END_ADDR   32'h1A10_6FFF

`define EU_START_ADDR            32'h1A10_9000
`define EU_END_ADDR              32'h1A10_AFFF

`define TIMER_START_ADDR         32'h1A10_B000
`define TIMER_END_ADDR           32'h1A10_BFFF

`define HWPE_START_ADDR          32'h1A10_C000
`define HWPE_END_ADDR            32'h1A10_CFFF

`define STDOUT_START_ADDR        32'h1A10_F000
`define STDOUT_END_ADDR          32'h1A10_FFFF

`define DEBUG_START_ADDR         32'h1A11_0000
`define DEBUG_END_ADDR           32'h1A11_FFFF

`define APB_ASSIGN_SLAVE(lhs, rhs)     \
    assign lhs.paddr    = rhs.paddr;   \
    assign lhs.pwdata   = rhs.pwdata;  \
    assign lhs.pwrite   = rhs.pwrite;  \
    assign lhs.psel     = rhs.psel;    \
    assign lhs.penable  = rhs.penable; \
    assign rhs.prdata   = lhs.prdata;  \
    assign rhs.pready   = lhs.pready;  \
    assign rhs.pslverr  = lhs.pslverr;

`define APB_ASSIGN_MASTER(lhs, rhs) `APB_ASSIGN_SLAVE(rhs, lhs)
